notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher David Peterson, assist to first baseman Mark Vientos. Matt Chapman scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher David Peterson, assist to first baseman Mark Vientos. Matt Chapman scores.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Marcus Semien out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Willy Adames GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Daniel Susac to 3rd. Casey Schmitt out at 2nd. Willy Adames out at 1st.
